style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a titled card: a heading reading exactly RICECO, a caption beneath reading SIX PRINCIPLES FOR A PROMPT, and six short numbered rule lines drawn as plain horizontal strokes numbered 1 through 6 with no words written on them. Do not invent, label, or write any principle names on the lines. On the right, a simple cycle: a box labelled AI OUTPUT connects by arrow to a box labelled VERIFY, which connects by arrow to a box labelled TRUST. A rust return arrow loops from VERIFY back to AI OUTPUT, labelled IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT. Below the cycle, a small caption reads VERIFY, THEN TRUST. The only words anywhere in the image are: RICECO, SIX PRINCIPLES FOR A PROMPT, the numerals 1 to 6, AI OUTPUT, VERIFY, TRUST, IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT, and VERIFY, THEN TRUST. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
